01 — About

Who I Am

I'm a Computer Science student at BINUS University in Indonesia, majoring in Artificial Intelligence. My work sits at the intersection of reinforcement learning, computer vision, and autonomous systems — I build agents that learn to act in complex environments, from racing cars in simulations to managing IoT infrastructure.

I completed an exchange program at Chang Gung University in Taiwan (Feb–Jun 2026), where I deepened my expertise in AIoT and advanced AI programming. I'm currently conducting pre-thesis research in deep RL for autonomous racing, targeting an IEEE-format publication.

Outside of research, I'm passionate about making AI practical — I've built systems that achieve meaningful energy savings, manage real-world IoT environments, and detect objects in 3D from monocular cameras.

Reinforcement Learning Researcher
Training RL agents with SAC, DroQ, IQN, and PEARL in continuous-control environments. Pre-thesis work targeting IEEE publication.
Database (SQLite) and App Development
Developed FinanceDB, a privacy-first personal finance tracker packaged as a desktop application (.exe) and an Android app (.apk).
International Exchange Alumni
Chang Gung University, Taiwan (2026) — studied AIoT, Advanced AI Programming, Data Science, and Clinical Informatics.
IELTS 8.0 — Proficient in English
Listening 8.5 · Reading 8.5 · Writing 7.0 · Speaking 7.0. Comfortable in academic and professional English environments.

02 — Projects & Research

What I've Built

Pre-Thesis Research · 2025 – Present
Deep RL for Autonomous Racing
Targeting IEEE-Format Publication

Training actor-critic and model-based RL algorithms for continuous-control driving agents in TrackMania (TMRL). Exploring meta-RL strategies and CNN + LiDAR sensor fusion, systematically benchmarking SAC, DroQ, IQN, and PEARL to identify optimal architectures for high-speed autonomous driving.

PyTorchTMRLReinforcement LearningSACDroQIQNLiDARCNNMeta-RL
github.com/Fane-Nathan/tmrl
Algorithms: SAC · DroQ · IQN · PEARL
Sensors: CNN + LiDAR Fusion
Strategy: Meta-RL Exploration
Env: TrackMania (TMRL)
App Development · 2026 – Present
Personal Finance Tracker
Privacy-First Offline Finance Management

Built a 100% offline, privacy-first personal finance tracking application using SQLite for secure local data management. Successfully built an .exe desktop application using Electron, an .apk for Android using Android Studio, and a PWA system for iOS.

ElectronSQLiteAndroid StudioPWAChart.js
github.com/D-L-R-Y/PersonalFinanceDB
Computer Vision · 2024
3D Object Detection for AVs
Modified YOLO3D Framework

Developed a real-time 3D object detection pipeline by fusing YOLOv11 with Depth Anything v2, creating a novel monocular YOLO3D framework for autonomous driving perception without LiDAR hardware.

YOLOv11Depth Anything v2Computer Vision3D Detection
Read the Paper
AIoT · 2026
Illuma — Smart Streetlight RL
AIoT-Enabled Adaptive Lighting

Built a PyTorch DQN agent with a custom Gymnasium + SUMO/TraCI environment to autonomously optimize street light brightness across randomized traffic scenarios.

Result: 64% energy savings across 200 randomized traffic scenarios
PyTorchDQNGymnasiumSUMOTraCIIoT
github.com/D-L-R-Y/SmartStreetLightRL
IoT · 2026
Smart Greenhouse IoT Agent
Autonomous Climate Control via RL

Designed and benchmarked Q-Learning vs DQN reinforcement learning agents to autonomously manage greenhouse climate control in stochastic environments.

Result: 99.6% near-optimal performance under stochastic conditions
PythonQ-LearningDQNIoTGymnasium
github.com/D-L-R-Y/SmartGreenhouseIoTAgent
